1) The host can set which connected guests can become players and participate in the game;
2) Players take turns to draw- each player has 60s- during which they can freely change words;
What is Unlimited Mode and One-round Mode
1) In Unlimited Mode- the game ends only when the host clicks to end- otherwise the game will continue round by round;
2) In One-round Mode- each player has only 60s to draw- and the game will end automatically after all players have finished drawing a round. The host can also force the game to end at any time.
1) Only the host and the connected guests can be players- and audience can only guess the word answer;
2) If a player leaves the guest in the middle of the game- the player will quit the game and his points will be cleared.
3) At the beginning of each game- all player points start from 0; at the end of each game- all player points are cleared;
4) After the score reaches the upper limit of 999999- it will no longer continue to accumulate.
3) Players can switch the color of the brush here;

4) Others can guess the word answer. The first person who guesses correctly will get 5 points- and the rest of the people who guess correctly will get 3 points. For each person who guesses correctly- the drawer will get the same points.
